title: Instantiate per bit array of modules with sub-range as output

features.name: per_bit_array_instantiation_with_partial_subrange_output
features.description: Code should include a per-bit array instantiation of a module where an output port is connected using a sub-range that does not span the full declared width of the signal

features.name: array_instantiation_output_uses_smaller_subrange
features.description: Code should include a module array instantiation where an output wire of width N has only a subset M (M<N) of its bits connected
